name: porttop
description: Terminal toolkit for inspecting active ports
author: trungtran <baotrung06092003@gmail.com>

scripts.build: bun build ./bin/porttop.ts --outfile ./dist/porttop.js --target node --bundle --minify --external react-devtools-core && bun -e "let f='dist/porttop.js',c=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');require('fs').writeFileSync(f,c.replace(/#!\/usr\/bin\/env bun/,'#!/usr/bin/env node'))" && chmod +x ./dist/porttop.js
